FlowDefinition.description: Evaluates conditions for whether or not an Onboarding CSAT Survey should be sent when SaaS or Billing Activation Funnel Stages are updated to "Activated" on the School object. First Scheduled path sends OB Handoff Email 24 hours after updates are made; second path sends the survey 48 hours after the initial update. Survey send itself occurs in the CF - Onboarding CSAT Survey due to the outbound message needing to come from the Combined Funnel object (NA - Sprint 13 '23)
